site.title: Brochures & Flyers | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom brochures and flyers printed and designed for businesses, events, and organizations in Simcoe County, Muskoka & GTA. Bi-fold, tri-fold, digital, and more.

hero.title: Brochures & Flyers
hero.imageAlt: Custom brochure and flyer printing services

centreText.title: Print That Gets Picked Up & Read
centreText.description: From folded brochures to single-sheet flyers and digital-ready handouts, we help you get your message in front of the right people in the right format.

features.title: Brochures
features.description:
We offer bi-fold and tri-fold brochures, along with a variety of great paper options to help match your brand, message, and budget. They are a strong choice for:

  • Office reception & waiting areas
  • Trade shows & community events
  • Information sessions
  • Promotions
  • Mailers

features.title: Flyers
features.description:
Flyers are a highly effective, affordable way to share your message. Whether you need a small batch for a local event or regular flyers for ongoing promotions, we make it simple for:

  • Promoting sales or special offers
  • Advertising events & fundraisers
  • Introducing a new product or service
  • Sharing community announcements
  • Handing out information at trade shows or open houses

features.title: Digital Brochures & Flyers
features.description:
Not everything needs to be printed. Our in-house design team can create customized flyers and brochures for digital use, helping your message look clean, professional, and ready for:

  • E-blasts & bulk emails
  • PDF handouts
  • Social sharing
  • Website downloads
